goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 09:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'ely'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
Make sure you get attraction type and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 09:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from ely
Make sure you get arrival time and travel time
